Introduction

Thank you for taking the time to speak with us about [Client Name].

Running a successful business takes more than basic compliance — it needs a properly structured finance function, clear reporting, and proactive, year-round support aligned with HMRC requirements. Our role is to act as your outsourced finance partner, setting your systems up correctly and supporting you as you grow.

This proposal sets out the services we recommend, with clear, fixed pricing throughout. (Type as much as you like — no limit.)

One-Off Setup & Implementation

Includes: software setup & configuration, chart of accounts tailored to the business, bank feed integration, payroll & pension setup, VAT configuration, initial finance processes and full system onboarding. (Edit this freely — no limit.)

Why CFA Accountants

  • Specialist support for owner-managed and regulated businesses
  • Fixed pricing with a transparent structure
  • Cloud accounting expertise (Xero / QuickBooks)
  • Proactive financial and tax support, not just year-end compliance
  • Scalable services as your business grows
  • A dedicated outsourced finance partner approach
